title: Muddy Hands Eco Friendly Decorative Oval Plant Pot with Legs Indoor Home Outdoor Garden Large Flower Planter Stand Holder Cover - Made from Recycled Plastic & Wood (Grey)
features: The wood is sourced from chippings that are leftover after the manufacture of furniture and other wooden products. These chips that would usually be disposed of get a new lease life in these range of pots. They create a product that is not only ecological but also adds a natural touch to any interior or terrace.
Comes with a a water reservoir located at the bottom of the pot and 4 legs to raise the planter giving it a hip modern feel.
Ideal for showcasing all types of house plants, flowers and small trees etc
Size: Pot Length: 43cm - Pot Width: 34.5cm - Pot Height wihtout Legs - 19cm - Pot Height with Legs: 24.5cm
